cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Leslie could have gone to the movies. Let me start by going through the information given step by step. First, Leslie woke up at 6am. Then, Susan saw Leslie on a rooftop from 6am to 7am. So that means between 6 and 7, Leslie was on the rooftop. Then Mary saw Leslie working at the office from 12pm to 2pm. So between noon and 2, Leslie was at work. Then Steven saw Leslie getting coffee from 2pm to 7pm. Wait, that's a long time for getting coffee. Maybe she was at the cafe for five hours? That seems a bit odd, but okay, the problem says that. So from 2 to 7pm, Leslie was at the cafe. And the movies closed after 7pm, so she had to go before that. Now, the question is, between what times could Leslie have gone to the movies? The options are A) 7am to 12pm, B) 2pm to 7pm, C) 12pm to 2pm, D) 6am to 7am. Let me list out Leslie's known activities: - 6am to 7am: on the rooftop with Susan. - 7am to 12pm: what? After Susan saw her until Mary saw her at the office at 12. So between 7am and 12pm, Leslie's whereabouts are not accounted for. Then she was at the office from 12-2pm, then at the cafe from 2-7pm. The movies closed after 7pm, so she had to go before that. So the possible times she was free would be 7am-12pm and maybe between 2-7pm, but wait, from 2-7pm she was at the cafe. So the only time she's free is between 7am and 12pm? Because after that, she's at the office until 2, then at the cafe until 7. But the movies are closed after 7pm, so she could have gone to the movies any time before 7pm, as long as she wasn't doing something else. So let's check the options. Option A is 7am to 12pm. That's a possible time because between 7 and 12, Leslie wasn't seen doing anything else. Then she was at the office from 12-2pm, so that's option C. But she couldn't have gone to the movies then because she was working. Then from 2-7pm, she was at the cafe (option B), so she couldn't go to the movies then either. Option D is 6-7am, but she was on the rooftop then with Susan. So she couldn't go to the movies then. Therefore, the only possible time is option A: 7am to 12pm. Because between that time, Leslie wasn't seen doing anything else. She woke up at 6am, then was on the rooftop until 7am. Then from 7am to 12pm, there's no account of her activities. Then she was at the office from 12-2. So the movies could have been between 7am and 12pm. Also, the movies are closed after 7pm, so she could have gone as late as 7pm, but the latest time given in option A is 12pm. The other options are either times when she was seen (D, C, B) or maybe overlapping. Wait, but what about between 2pm and 7pm?
